headline: The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD): A Prime Candidate for Affordable Growth Investing
summary: The Trade Desk (TTD) exemplifies affordable growth, blending strong revenue/profit expansion, high margins, a debt-free balance sheet, and reasonable valuation metrics.
